promptTemplate: You are in the repository root for this benchmark.
Use the Obsidian CLI that is already available in this repo for vault inspection. Prefer `./bin/obsidian-dev obsidian ...` commands when you need vault data.
Return only JSON matching the provided schema. Do not wrap the JSON in markdown fences.
Task: count the number of lines that contain the literal substring `TODO` under the vault path prefix `{{golden.searchScope.pathPrefix}}` and return the prefix plus the count.
